hero.title: Partner with AYANAVITA
hero.description: Bring a new level of wellness experience to your spa, salon, or studio. AYANAVITA helps wellness professionals create personalized experiences that combine beauty, wellbeing, and lifestyle guidance in a way that feels modern, holistic, and meaningful.

whyPartner.title: Why Partner with AYANAVITA?
whyPartner.description: Today’s clients are looking for more than traditional beauty or spa services. They want experiences that feel thoughtful, personalized, calming, and connected to their overall wellbeing.

items.title: Personalized Wellness Experience
items.description: Offer services that feel more tailored, intentional, and meaningful for each client.

items.title: Modern Wellness Positioning
items.description: Elevate your brand with a concept that connects beauty, wellbeing, and lifestyle.

items.title: Simple to Integrate
items.description: Bring the AYANAVITA concept into your service environment with guided support.

partnerValue.title: What You Receive as a Partner
partnerValue.description: As an AYANAVITA partner, you receive a structured foundation to introduce a more elevated wellness experience to your clients.

items.title: Brand Use
items.description: The right to use the AYANAVITA brand within the scope of the partnership model.

items.title: Standardized Programs
items.description: Access to curated wellness concepts and structured service frameworks.

items.title: Operational Guidance
items.description: Support for onboarding, implementation, and service delivery.

items.title: Service Development Support
items.description: Guidance to help you shape and expand your wellness offering with confidence.

audience.title: Who Can Become an AYANAVITA Partner?
audience.description: AYANAVITA welcomes partners who want to offer more meaningful and personalized wellness experiences to their clients.

items.title: Become an AYANAVITA Licensed Partner
description: AYANAVITA partners with spas, salons, and wellness studios that want to bring more personalized care experiences to their clients.
Through the Licensed Partner model, partners can work with the AYANAVITA brand, concept, and wellness programs to strengthen and expand their service offering.
bullets: The right to use the AYANAVITA brand

items.title: Professional Training
description: AYANAVITA also offers training programs for wellness professionals and partners who want to better understand and correctly apply the methods behind the system.

items.title: Distribution Partner
description: AYANAVITA welcomes distribution partners who want to bring wellness products from the ecosystem to a wider audience.
Distribution partners may collaborate in the development and distribution of products such as:

process.title: How the Partnership Works
process.description: Our partnership process is designed to be clear, supportive, and easy to follow.

items.title: Apply
items.description: Submit your partnership interest and tell us about your business.

items.title: Consultation
items.description: Receive an introduction to the AYANAVITA concept and partnership model.

items.title: Training & Onboarding
items.description: Get guidance, training, and a structured setup process for launch.

items.title: Start Offering
items.description: Bring AYANAVITA experiences to your clients with confidence and clarity.

cta.title: Start Your AYANAVITA Partnership Journey
cta.description: Join a growing wellness ecosystem and bring personalized wellness experiences to your clients.
